hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start by defining houseLeft and houseTop, then derive other positions from those

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The roof overhangs the house by 4 on each side: roofLeft = houseLeft - 4

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Window positions can be calculated from houseLeft: window1Left = houseLeft + 10

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The door is centered: doorLeft = houseLeft + (houseWidth - doorWidth) / 2

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The door knob x = doorLeft + doorWidth - knobRadius - 1
